name: Insecure pipeline YAML with hardcoded secrets
content:
name: Deploy to Production
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Configure AWS
        env:
          AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
          AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY
      - name: Deploy
        run: |
          echo "DB_PASSWORD=supersecret123" >> .env
          docker login -u admin -p mypassword123 registry.example.com
          docker pull registry.example.com/app:latest
          docker run -d -e DB_URL=postgres://admin:supersecret123@db.prod.example.com/app registry.example.com/app:latest
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact
        with:
          name: logs

name: GitHub Actions: unpinned action version
content:
name: CI
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout
      - uses: actions/setup-node
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm test

name: Missing job timeout configuration
content:
name: Long Running Job
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Build
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run build
          npm test

name: Docker base image without version pinning
content:
name: Build Image
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Build Docker Image
        run: |
          docker build -t myapp:latest .
where: .
has:
  - FROM ubuntu:latest
  - RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3
  - COPY . /app

name: Missing job permissions configuration
content:
name: Deploy
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          kubectl apply -f deploy.yaml
          helm upgrade --install myapp ./chart

name: Cache invalidation causing rebuild on every run
content:
FROM node:18-alpine
RUN git clone https://github.com/myorg/myrepo.git /app
WORKDIR /app
RUN npm install
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

error: no credentials supplied when attempting to pull

name: Race condition in parallel job steps
content:
name: Build and Test
on: [push]
jobs:
  parallel-steps:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
      - name: Test
        run: npm test
